ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "code" TEXT /* Product code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "size" TEXT /* Product size */,
  "thickness" INTEGER /* Product thickness */,
  "packaging" TEXT /* Product packaging */,
  "volume_packaging" INTEGER /* Product volume packaging */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Category name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Category description */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "primary_image" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Warehouse name */,
  "address" TEXT /* Warehouse address */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Warehouse capacity */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, sales representative, customer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who asked the question */,
  "question_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question text */,
  "answered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question has been answered */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "answered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who answered the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was asked */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_answered_by FOREIGN KEY ("answered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
